titulo: Automatic Recurring Task Generation in ClickUp
descricao: Reads recurring task definitions from a Google Sheet (frequency, day, time, owner) and creates the tasks automatically in ClickUp according to the schedule rule.
problema: Recurring tasks were created manually in ClickUp, risking missed tasks and inconsistent owner assignment.
resultado: Tasks created automatically every hour according to configurable spreadsheet criteria.
metrica: Automatic hourly task creation with configurable rules
destaques: Flexible scheduling logic (monthly, weekly, by day)
